title: Potgieter leads rearguard as Hants frustrate Surrey | Cricket News
description: Hampshire's lower order frustrates Surrey on day three of their County Championship match at the Kia Oval.

blocks.text: Cricket update: Potgieter leads rearguard as Hants frustrate Surrey. Hampshire's lower order frustrates Surrey on day three of their County Championship match at the Kia Oval.
